title: ClickUp Webhook Payload
description: The payload delivered by ClickUp when a webhook event is triggered. Each payload includes the event type, webhook identifier, and an array of history items describing the specific changes that occurred.

event.description: The name of the event that triggered the webhook.

webhook_id.description: The unique identifier of the webhook subscription that matched this event.

task_id.description: The ID of the task involved in the event. Present for task-related events.

list_id.description: The ID of the list involved in the event. Present for list-related events.

folder_id.description: The ID of the folder involved in the event. Present for folder-related events.

space_id.description: The ID of the space involved in the event. Present for space-related events.

goal_id.description: The ID of the goal involved in the event. Present for goal and key result events.

history_items.description: Array of change records describing what was modified in this event.

HistoryItem.description: A single change record within a webhook event payload.

id.description: The unique identifier of the history item.

type.description: The type code of the history item.

date.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the change occurred.

field.description: The name of the field that was changed (e.g., status, priority, assignee, due_date, tag, comment, name, description, time_estimate, time_spent).

data.description: Additional contextual data about the change.

source.description: The source of the change. Null for changes made through the UI, 'api' for API changes.

before.description: The value of the field before the change. Type varies based on the field.

after.description: The value of the field after the change. Type varies based on the field.

WebhookUser.description: The user who performed the action that triggered the webhook event.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

username.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

color.description: The hex color code associated with the user.

profilePicture.description: URL of the user's profile picture.
